final:
module decoder_2to4 (
    input wire [1:0] A,
    output reg [3:0] Y
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (A)
            2'b00: Y = 4'b0001; // Output Y0 is high
            2'b01: Y = 4'b0010; // Output Y1 is high
            2'b10: Y = 4'b0100; // Output Y2 is high
            2'b11: Y = 4'b1000; // Output Y3 is high
            default: Y = 4'b0000; // Default case (should not occur)
        endcase
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y[0] <= ~A[0];
      Y[1] <= A[0] & ~A[1];
      Y[2] <= ~A[0] & A[1];
      Y[3] <= A[0] & A[1];
    end
  end

endmodule
